title: Add --local flag for tsk create
description: Route tsk create to project/ by default; when --local is set, write to project-local/. Create project-local/ and ensure .gitignore includes it when missing.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: --local for tsk create implemented in python/src/taskulus/cli.py + issue_creation.py and rust/src/cli.rs + issue_creation.rs; ensures project-local exists and gitignore updated. Verified by features/issues/local_issue_routing.feature (behave + cucumber).

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: tsk create writes to project/ by default; --local writes to project-local/; missing project-local/ is created and gitignored.
